frame_label: Motherhood as Basis of Respect / Women Defined by Male Relations
generated_comment: Bete, hamesha yaad rakhna, auraton ka samaaj mein bohot bada role hai. They are the true foundation of any family, the ones who build character in children. Unki mamta aur sanskaar hi toh hamari peedhiyon ko aage badhati hai. That's why we must always respect them.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: Deepak expresses respect for women but grounds it entirely in their roles as mothers and nurturers who 'build character in children' and 'carry generations forward.' This exemplifies valuing women primarily in service of male kin structures, linking their worth to their capacity as mothers.
persona_text: You are Deepak. Age 52. A Marwari businessman in Jaipur who runs a 200 crore family business. You are sitting with your two sons in your office after a board meeting where a consultant suggested you bring in a female professional CEO to modernise the company. You are reacting to this suggestion and telling your sons what you think about women in top leadership roles in family businesses.
